verdict_reasoning: ATP5F1B is a mitochondrial matrix-facing F1 catalytic subunit of ATP synthase, embedded in the inner mitochondrial membrane as part of an obligate oligomeric complex. It has no membrane anchor of its own, no secretion pathway, no documented surface pool, and no known cell-state, developmental, or stress-induced relocalization to the plasma membrane. It is inaccessible from the extracellular space.
